title: The Incarnation — God With Us
objective: Marvel at the mystery of the Incarnation: the eternal Son of God takes on human flesh in the person of Jesus.

sections.text: And the Word became flesh and dwelt among us, and we have seen his glory, glory as of the only Son from the Father, full of grace and truth.

title: The Baptism & Temptation of Jesus
objective: See Jesus identified as God's beloved Son at His baptism and victorious over Satan's temptations in the wilderness.

sections.text: And behold, a voice from heaven said, 'This is my beloved Son, with whom I am well pleased.'

title: Jesus Announces the Kingdom
objective: Understand what Jesus means by 'the kingdom of God' and why His announcement is the best news in the world.

sections.text: The time is fulfilled, and the kingdom of God is at hand; repent and believe in the gospel.

title: Miracles & Parables
objective: Explore Jesus' miracles as signs of the in-breaking kingdom and His parables as invitations into kingdom life.

sections.text: But if it is by the finger of God that I cast out demons, then the kingdom of God has come upon you.

title: Jesus Teaches the Law Perfectly
objective: See how Jesus does not abolish the Law but fulfills it, living the life of perfect obedience we could not live.

sections.text: Do not think that I have come to abolish the Law or the Prophets; I have not come to abolish them but to fulfill them.

title: The Transfiguration
objective: Encounter the glory of Christ revealed on the mountain and understand what it means for His identity and mission.

sections.text: And a voice came out of the cloud, saying, 'This is my Son, my Chosen One; listen to him!'

title: Palm Sunday & Holy Week
objective: Follow Jesus into Jerusalem as the crowds welcome their King, and see the events that set the cross in motion.

sections.text: And those who went before and those who followed were shouting, 'Hosanna! Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord! Blessed is the coming kingdom of our father David! Hosanna in the highest!'

title: The Last Supper
objective: Receive Jesus' gift of His body and blood in the bread and wine and understand the new covenant He is about to seal.

sections.text: And likewise the cup after they had eaten, saying, 'This cup that is poured out for you is the new covenant in my blood.'
